title: taraxacum longicorne
intro: Taraxacum longicorne, also known as the long-spurred dandelion, is a species of flowering plant within the dandelion family. As a medicinal plant, Taraxacum longicorne has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum longicorne include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. Taraxacum longicorne can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
